tasks.text: Build semi-raw rubber treads onto buffed tire casings to prepare tires for vulcanization in recapping or retreading processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trim excess rubber and imperfections during retreading processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fill cuts and holes in tires, using hot rubber.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place tires into molds for new tread.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fit inner tubes and final layers of rubber onto tires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Buff tires according to specifications for width and undertread depth.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Brush or spray solvents onto plies to ensure adhesion, and repeat process as specified, alternating direction of each ply to strengthen tires.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Start rollers that bond tread and plies as drums revolve.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Align treads with guides, start drums to wind treads onto plies, and slice ends.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect worn tires for faults, cracks, cuts, and nail holes, and to determine if tires are suitable for retreading.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Measure tires to determine mold size requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Roll hand rollers over rebuilt casings, exerting pressure to ensure adhesion between camelbacks and casings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position ply stitcher rollers and drums according to width of stock, using hand tools and gauges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut plies at splice points, and press ends together to form continuous bands.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Depress pedals to rotate drums, and wind specified numbers of plies around drums to form tire bodies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and paint completed tires.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Rub cement sticks on drum edges to provide adhesive surfaces for plies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Depress pedals to collapse drums after processing is complete.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Wind chafers and breakers onto plies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pull plies from supply racks, and align plies with edges of drums.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
